Publish.LongDescription:
### Important Update: New Preset
This update introduces a new master preset designed to achieve a **perceptually neutral** baseline.
- New Preset: **Jukka Filmstock FJ D55** - Target LUT: **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D55** - Goal: To neutralize the engine's and LUT built-in biases and provide a clean, professional start for your city's visuals. - Installation: The preset file will automatically sync to your Lumina folder upon game relaunch. - Adjustments: Pretty much everything has been tuned in the preset file.
The LUT files themselves remain unchanged.
By emulating the characteristics of classic Kodak and Fujifilm film stocks, this pack delivers richer colours, enhanced contrast, saturation roll off.
### Quick Start & Usage: 1. Load your save game and open the Lumina menu and go to the first tab. 2. Import the Filmstock preset by typing **Filmstock FJ D55 Jukka** 3. Press **IMPORT PRESET** 4. Tick **ENABLE LUMINA VOLUME** else nothing will apply either preset or LUT's 5. Navigate to the "Tonemapping" tab (sun inside a square). 6. Set the **Tonemapping Mode** to **External** 7. Choose **Tonemapping Texture** from the list **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D55** 8. Ensure LUT Contribution is set to **1** else you will have white and saturation clipping. Use adjustments in the last tab instead to fine-tune later. 9. Click **Load LUT**
### Extra Notes:
- **Legacy Content:** The original "Filmstock" and "Filmstock FJ D55 A" presets are now considered legacy/outdated. For the best experience, use the "**Jukka_Filmstock_FJ_D55**" preset. - **Lighting:** Looks best with **SSGI enabled**, yet not required. - **Texture Warning:** Some custom terrain textures are authored as overexposed they may appear very bright. - **Subjectivity:** Color is personal! The Jukka preset is a perfect "Gold Standard" starting point, but feel free to adjust to your own taste. I would not touch the saturation as this will change neutral balance of the preset, yet if you want cooler or warmer look adjust temperature, or else what you wish. - **Latitude Longitude:** Preset sets it to the equator but if you were not using lumina to set it up but Time & Weather anarchy there is no effect afaik. - **SSGI:** "Jukka" preset will turn it on, but it does not manage its settings, please refer to this guide if you need to make it look better, or turn it off yourself. https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/threads/ssgi-screen-space-global-illumination-settings-explained-quality-and-optimization-with-screenshots.1884624/ - **SSAO:** "Jukka" Preset will turn it on, and only options to control it further are inside Lumina. - **Road Textures:** Presets will turn it off, and change the settings.
### LUT List:
- **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D55** (Warmest) - **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D60** (Slightly warm) - **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D65** (Coolest) - **Dam_Filmstock_KD_D55** (Warmest) - **Dam_Filmstock_KD_D60** (Slightly warm) - **Dam_Filmstock_KD_D65** (Coolest)
### Preset List:
- **Filmstock** (Legacy) - **Filmstock FJ D55 A** (Removed) - **Filmstock FJ D55 Jukka**
### Special Thanks **Nyoko** **Jukka (Jen1)**
Publish.ChangeLog: - New Preset: "Jukka Filmstock FJ D55" for LUT: "Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D55"
